title: Jessica Kelly
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Jessica Kelly
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_titles: Associate Director, Center for Effective Teaching
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

education_entries: Ph D in Mathematics, Baylor University
research_interests: Exceptional orthogonal polynomial systems, special functions, functional analysis, spectral theory, differential equations, Lyapunov inequalities
teaching_interests: My teaching interests range from introductory level mathematics courses such at Precalculus, Business Calculus, and Calculus up through many 300 and 400 level courses for majors. I particularly enjoy teaching courses in the Calculus sequence, differential equations and real analysis.
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2023). The spectrum of self-adjoint extensions associated with exceptional Laguerre differential expressions . Journal of Spectral Theory.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2023). Lower bounds for eigenvalues of even ordered quasilinear differential equations . Proceedings of the American Mathematical Society. Volume, 151. Pages, 647-661.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Lyapunov-type Inequalities for Third Order Linear and Half-Linear Difference Equations . Journal of Difference Equations and Applications.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2020). Mastering Your Sales Pitch: Selling Mastery Based Testing to Your Students and Yourself . Problems, Resources, and Issues in Mathematics Undergraduate Studies.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). A Non Green's Function Approach to Fractional Lyapunov-Type Inequalities with Applications to Multivariate Domains . Differential Equations and Applications. Volume, 11. Issue, 3. Pages, 409-425.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). Mastery-based Testing in Undergraduate Mathematics Courses . PRIMUS.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2017). Moment representations of exceptional X_1 orthogonal polynomials . Journal of Mathematical Analysis and Applications. Volume, 455. Issue, 2. Pages, 1848-1869.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2016). The spectral analysis of three families of exceptional Laguerre polynomials . Journal of Approximation Theory. Volume, 202. Pages, 36.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2015). Spectral analysis for the exceptional X_m-Jacobi equation . Electronic Journal of Differential Equations. Volume, 2015. Issue, 194. Pages, 10.
